notes.text:
✅ US40 (Observability) + US41 (Task Monitor) confirmed live and working — verified 2026-04-30 12:30 AEST by Ken.
US40: obs.db active, 6 events logged (2 ERROR, 1 WARN, 3 INFO), collector running every 5 min.
US41: tasks.db active, 13 tasks tracked today, 9 verified, 0 stalled, 0 failed.

notes.message: ✅ W1P1 POSTED: LinkedIn "Practitioner Intro" post went live at 07:52 AEST. Initial cron failed HTTP 426 (expired LinkedIn API version 202501). Yoda fixed: scripts updated 202501→202503, post manually retried and published successfully (HTTP 201). CHG-0163 logged. W1P2 (Wed 12pm) and W1P3 (Thu 7:30am) will use fixed version — no action needed.
